The '''Darglum system''', also known as the '''Umgul system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Dargul]] and [[Umgul/Legends|Umgul]].

{{System-stub}}
